text:
NAME: RSN_VISIT_CD1 
RSN_VISIT_CD2 
RSN_VISIT_CD3 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 7 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Prior to version “J,” this field was: CLM_ADMTG_DGNS_CD. 

With version “J,” the name has changed and there can be up to 3 occurrences of this group. 

On October 1, 2015, the conversion from the 9th version of the International Classification of Diseases 
(ICD-9-CM) to version 10 (ICD-10-CM) occurred.
